'''Eddriss Sark''' was an officer in [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]]. [[Milo Thirk]], the [[Intelligence Bureau Chief]] in the [[Bespin system/Legends|Bespin system]], sent a report on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City's]] new [[Baron Administrator/Legends|Baron Administrator]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], to Sark.<ref name="SWS" />
